channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: JuJu Watkins and No. 4 USC try to bring 'some fun' to weary and fire-ravaged Los Angeles
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins and the rest of the Southern California women's basketball team had a couple of special visitors in the locker room Sunday night. Cherie Nelson, who held the program's scoring record for many years with a 50-point game, was among several Trojan alumni at Galen Center.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Turning the page: Eagles receiver A.J. Brown reads inspirational book on sideline during playoff win
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A.J. Brown had a novel ideal to pass time on the bench during Philadelphia's wild-card playoff game.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Hurts tosses 2 TD passes and Goedert throws 3 stiff-arms to lead Eagles past Packers 22-10
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Dallas Goedert fired one stiff arm to a Packers defender, smacked him again and then — in a sports city known for its Broad Street Bullies — dispatched one final shot to the face on his way to end zone.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Josh Allen leads balanced offense as Bills dominate Broncos for 31-7 wild-card win
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills' spread-the-wealth approach on offense that was so productive in the regular season proved unstoppable in their playoff opener.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Oregon Ducks 2024 receiver arrested as fugitive
item.description: Ryan Tristan Chance Taylor -- who played under the name Ryan Pellum -- allegedly used a 9mm pistol to assault someone on December 25 in Long Beach, California.
item.dc:creator: Tim Steele, NewsNation

item.title: Commanders' Jayden Daniels bleeds after suffering gash below eye vs Bucs
item.description: Washington Commanders rookie Jayden Daniels suffered a cut below his eye and was bleeding during Sunday's game against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles' AJ Brown reads book on sideline during team's playoff win
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles star wide receiver A.J. Brown was seen on the sidelines reading a book late in the team's playoff win over the Green Bay Packers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Coaching Tracker: The Bears' search to find their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have assembled a six-person panel to find their next head coach, with Ryan Poles as the final decision-maker, and have requested to interview Joe Brady, Thomas Brown, Matt Campbell, Pete Carroll, Brian Flores, Marcus Freeman, Aaron Glenn, Joe Brady, and David Shaw.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Pacers end NBA-leading Cavaliers' winning streak at 12 with 108-93 victory
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Andrew Nembhard scored 19 points, Pascal Siakam had 18 points and nine rebounds and the Indiana Pacers ended NBA-leading Cleveland's winning streak at 12 games, beating the Cavaliers 108-93 on Sunday night. The teams will complete the home-and-home set Tuesday night in Indianapolis.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN DULIK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Fired US Center for SafeSport investigator arrested on new charges
item.description: DENVER (AP) — An ex-cop fired from his job as an investigator at the U.S. Center for SafeSport for allegedly stealing money seized at a drug bust has been arrested again, this time charged with rape and sex trafficking.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tom Brady partners with Gopuff to deliver $250K in free water to those affected by Los Angeles wildfires
item.description: NFL legendary quarterback Tom Brady has partnered with Gopuff to deliver $250,000 worth of free water for those affected by the Los Angeles wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New England hires former Patriots Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as coach
item.description: The New England Patriots have hired Mike Vrabel as their head coach. The team announced the hiring Sunday morning, a week after Patriots owner Robert Kraft fired Jerod Mayo following the team’s season-ending victory over the Buffalo Bills. Mayo finished 4-13 in his lone season.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Barcelona routs Real Madrid again to win Spanish Super Cup final 5-2
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Real Madrid came out looking for some payback in the latest “clasico” against Barcelona but ended up being embarrassed again. Madrid lost 5-2 to Barcelona in the Spanish Super Cup final in Saudi Arabia on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Round 2 rematch: Texans to square off with Chiefs in Saturday AFC divisional round road game
item.description: Texans lost to Chiefs in regular season game during which wide receiver Tank Dell suffered a season-ending knee injury
item.dc:creator: Aaron Wilson, KPRC 2

item.title: Tottenham avoids massive FA Cup shock with extra-time win as Man United beats Arsenal on penalties
item.description: Tottenham endured the humiliation of being taken to extra time by Tamworth, an opponent nearly 100 places lower in English soccer’s pyramid, before winning 3-0 and avoiding one of the biggest shocks in FA Cup history on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New England Patriots hire former Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as next coach
item.description: Vrabel, a fan favorite during eight seasons as a player in New England where he was a member of its first three Super Bowl winners and an inductee into the team’s Hall of Fame in 2023, was the preferred candidate because of his long association with the franchise and coaching success.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl champ's son delivers brutal knockout in lacrosse fight
item.description: Toronto Rock defender Elijah Gash, the son of Super Bowl champion Sam Gash, delivered a knockout blow to Buffalo Bandits' Zack Belter on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hady Habib becomes the first man representing Lebanon to win a Grand Slam singles match
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Hady Habib's history-making run at the Australian Open will continue after the first man to represent Lebanon in a Grand Slam singles tournament in the Open era became the first to win a match, defeating Bu Yunchaokete of China 7-6 (4), 6-4, 7-6 (6) on Sunday in front of
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Clear skies and clear minds: Rams regroup in Arizona to prepare for playoff game vs. Vikings
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Everything seemed pretty normal for the Los Angeles Rams during Saturday's practice at their temporary home on a beautiful afternoon in suburban Phoenix.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC loses on late goal to Islanders, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Mathew Barzal scored with 1:25 left in regulation and the New York Islanders defeated the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Saturday. The forward found a rebound off a scrum in front of the net and lifted it over a sprawling Connor Ingram from the right circle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Late NHL star Johnny Gaudreau's No. 8 jersey retired by the USHL's Dubuque Fighting Saints
item.description: DUBUQUE, Iowa (AP) — Late NHL star Johnny Gaudreau's No. 8 jersey was retired by the Dubuque Fighting Saints on Saturday night during an emotional ceremony before their United States Hockey League game against Sioux City. Gaudreau and brother Matthew died Aug.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Justin Verlander and San Francisco Giants finalize $15 million, 1-year contract
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Justin Verlander and the San Francisco Giants finalized a $15 million, one-year contract on Saturday. A three-time AL Cy Young Award winner, Verlander joins a projected rotation led by All-Star right-hander Logan Webb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hyman scores in 3rd period as the Oilers rally past the Blackhawks 4-3
item.description: Zach Hyman scored a tiebreaking power-play goal in the third period, and the Edmonton Oilers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chargers' Justin Herbert skewered for nightmare performance in playoff meltdown vs. Texans
item.description: Los Angeles Chargers quarterback Justin Herbert threw four interceptions in his team's 32-12 playoff loss to the Houston Texans Saturday
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chicago faces Sacramento, aims for 5th straight home win
item.description: Sacramento Kings (19-19, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (18-20, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 3:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Sacramento aiming to extend its four-game home winning streak. The Bulls have gone 8-11 at home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Jack Sawyer had the kind of moment that will live on long past his playing days with Ohio State. Of course, one more victory would make it that much sweeter.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LaVine scores 33 points as Bulls beat Wizards 138-105 for 5th win in 7 games
item.description: Zach LaVine scored 33 points and the Chicago Bulls beat the Washington Wizards 138-105 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Red Wings hold off Blackhawks 5-3 for 6th straight victory
item.description: Alex DeBrincat and Lucas Raymond each had a goal and an assist and the Detroit Red Wings won their sixth straight game, beating the Chicago Blackhawks 5-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Vince McMahon reaches deal with SEC over hush money agreements
item.description: McMahon, according to the SEC, failed to inform WWE's board of directors and legal and financial departments of the settlement agreements.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: CMU Basketball: Men get first RMAC win under Dunlap as Women cruise past NMHU
item.description: After a three-week break, Colorado Mesa Basketball is back. And they're off to a great start in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Google Trends: Nearly every US state is searching the Broncos over the Bills
item.description: We looked at Google Trends statistics to see whether the Broncos or the Bills were the talk of the country – and one team won by a landslide.
item.dc:creator: Morgan Whitley, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles Rams' playoff game moved to Arizona as wildfires disrupt sports in Southern California
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NFL moved the Los Angeles Rams’ playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings out of Southern California on Thursday, the biggest of several changes to the sports calendar after days of devastating wildfires in the area.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Notre Dame secures spot in the CFP National Championship after win over Penn State
item.description: Notre Dame has secured a spot in the College Football Playoff National Championship game after defeating Penn State 27-24 in the Orange Bowl on Thursday night. This is a breaking news update, the original story can be found below. No. 3 Notre Dame (13-1, CFP No. 7 seed) vs. No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox sign former Seattle Mariners infielder
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox signed free agent infielder Josh Rojas Wednesday, according to a press release from the team. The White Sox agreed to terms on a one-year, $3.5-million contract with Rojas. Rojas spent the 2024 season with the Seattle Mariners, hitting .225/.304/.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Chainsmokers, Zedd to perform in San Francisco for NBA All-Star Weekend
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The NBA's All-Star Weekend is coming to the Bay Area in February, and along with the on-court events, the weekend will feature various festivities throughout the region.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Emeka Eneli, Diego Luna called to USMNT Camp after breakout seasons
item.description: Real Salt Lake midfielder Emeka Eneli and Diego Luna's stellar 2024 MLS campaigns have been rewarded with call-ups to the U.S. Men's National Team's January training camp, making a pivotal moment in their burgeoning careers.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Women's wrestler Marissa Gallegos reflects on wrestling journey
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Marissa Gallegos is no stranger to the spotlight. The Colorado Mesa University star has cemented her legacy as the winningest women’s wrestler in program history. Her career, defined by grit, dominance, and determination, has inspired athletes across the sport.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
